mapper.sql:
FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SO INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON SO.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND SO.SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CO ON SO.OWKEY = CO.OWKEY AND SO.COHDKEY = CO.COHDKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_CT CT ON SO.CTKEY = CT.CTKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_IC IC ON SD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND SD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_UR UR ON SD.UPDATEURKEY = UR.URKEY WHERE COALESCE(SO.NISYN, 'N') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(SD.NISYN, 'N') = 'Y'
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}

SELECT COALESCE(SO.ORDERISTDAY, '-') AS obinstrdt , SO.CTKEY AS ctkey , COALESCE(CT.CTNM, '-') AS ctnm , COALESCE(SO.ORGORDERKEY, '-') AS custordno , COALESCE(SO.SOHDKEY, '-') AS soordno , COALESCE(SO.COHDKEY, '-') AS coordno , COALESCE(SD.ICKEY, '-') AS ickey , COALESCE(IC.ICNM, '-') AS icnm , COALESCE(SD.NISQTY, 0) AS nisqty , COALESCE(UR.URNM, COALESCE(SD.UPDATEURKEY, '-')) AS procusernm , COALESCE(SD.UPDATEDATE, '-') AS procdttm
mapper.select:
/* oms-report-nisProcStatusInfoList-sql-oracle.xml - selectNisProcStatusInfoList */
ORDER BY SO.ORDERISTDAY DESC, SO.SOHDKEY DESC, SD.SODTKEY DESC

/* oms-report-nisProcStatus-sql-oracle.xml - selectNisProcStatusList */
ORDER BY SO.ORDERISTDAY DESC, SO.SOHDKEY DESC, SD.SODTKEY DESC
